subject: Google
object: 99美元Gemini智能音箱
source_quote: After years of incremental updates, Google is betting that its Gemini AI can reinvent its smart speaker. On Wednesday, the company introduced its first audio device built specifically for Gemini with the $99.99 Google Home Speaker.

subject: Google
object: 99美元Gemini智能音箱
source_quote: The new Google Home device is the first stand-alone smart speaker from the tech giant since the Nest Audio in September 2020 . That older device arrived at a time when smart speakers were thought of largely as handy controllers for your smart home and music-playing systems. They lacked the smarts of today’s AI chatbots, as commands often had to be phrased correctly to get things to work.

subject: Google
object: 99美元Gemini智能音箱
source_quote: The Google Home Speaker is changing that, as you’ll be able to speak using natural language requests and even make multistep requests using the phrasing you’d like. For instance, you could tell the speaker to “turn off all the lights except for my bedside lamp,” or “dim the kitchen lights, play some relaxing music, and set a timer for 20 minutes.”

subject: Anthropic
object: Frontier 碳去除联盟，成首家 AI 初创成员
source_quote: Anthropic becomes first AI startup to join the Frontier carbon removal coalition

subject: Anthropic
object: Frontier 碳去除联盟，成首家 AI 初创成员
source_quote: Anthropic is joining Frontier, the carbon removal collective, contributing to a new $915 million tranche of funding and marking its arrival as the first AI startup to join the group.

subject: Anthropic
object: Frontier 碳去除联盟，成首家 AI 初创成员
source_quote: The new funding will help bolster Frontier’s position in the carbon removal industry, but more notable are Anthropic’s pledges. While Google is a founding member, Anthropic is the first pure AI company to join the ranks. Its membership comes at a time when AI companies have been on an energy buying spree, not all of which has been squeaky clean.

subject: Anthropic
object: Frontier 碳去除联盟，成首家 AI 初创成员
source_quote: Joining Frontier is Anthropic’s first climate-related deal. The company has yet to produce a sustainability report, and it has said it favors an “all of the above” approach to energy, a statement which typically translates into large purchases of polluting power. But the move might signal changing attitudes within the company.

subject: Odyssey
object: $310 million Series B round
source_quote: Odyssey, a world model AI startup founded by self-driving vehicle pioneers CEO Oliver Cameron and CTO Jeff Hawke, has raised a $310 million Series B round at a $1.45B valuation led by Natural Capital, with Amazon, AMD Ventures, GV, and others participating.

subject: Anthropic 在首尔开设办公室并宣布多项韩国AI生态
object: Anthropic has signed an MOU with Korea’s Ministry of Science and ICT to support the safe and responsible adoption of AI across the public sector. Together, we’ll collaborate on AI safety and cybersecurity, including evaluating model safety in the Korean language with the Korea AI Safety Institute, and exchanging information on AI-enabled cyber threats.
source_quote: Anthropic has signed an MOU with Korea’s Ministry of Science and ICT to support the safe and responsible adoption of AI across the public sector. Together, we’ll collaborate on AI safety and cybersecurity, including evaluating model safety in the Korean language with the Korea AI Safety Institute, and exchanging information on AI-enabled cyber threats.

object: Expansion | Evermx
source_quote: On May 14, 2026, PwC and Anthropic announced a substantial expansion of their strategic alliance, moving Claude from a supplementary tool to a foundational technology across PwC's client delivery and internal operations. The expanded partnership includes training and certifying 30,000 PwC professionals on Claude, establishing a joint Center of Excellence, launching a new "Office of the CFO" business unit built on Claude, and extending rollout toward PwC's global workforce of 364,000 employees.

source_quote: Herzliya, Israel · June 4, 2026 — Today we're announcing that Willow has raised $7 million in seed funding , led by Hetz Ventures , to build the access layer enterprises need to safely adopt AI agents at scale.

subject: Willow
object: M to Build the Future of Enterprise AI Agent Governance | Willow
source_quote: After a year running quietly inside Wix at the scale of thousands of employees, Willow emerges from stealth as the Agentic Access Platform for the enterprise. Hetz Ventures leads the round.

subject: Willow
object: M to Build the Future of Enterprise AI Agent Governance | Willow
source_quote: Willow is the AI Basecamp for the enterprise : a unified Agentic Access Platform where every AI agent gets a real identity, scoped access to exactly the tools its task requires, runtime guardrails, and a full audit trail tied to a human. The platform is already running in production at Wix , powering ~5,000 weekly active users across engineering, product, design, HR, finance, and legal. Deployments are now expanding across cyber security, real estate, fintech, and adtech.

subject: Governed AI Agents: How to
object: and Scale with Confidence
source_quote: ” but “How do we manage hundreds or thousands of agents our teams are deploying?

subject: Governed AI Agents: How to
object: and Scale with Confidence
source_quote: Unchecked AI adoption can lead to agent sprawl — a rapid proliferation of agents that makes discovering and managing agents extremely difficult. It can also lead to “shadow AI,” meaning teams are building and deploying agents outside the IT department’s purview and control, creating risks in areas such as security, compliance, and project redundancy. Unchecked AI adoption can also lead to new technical debt, which, ironically, is one of the problems people have been adopting AI to solve.

subject: Governed AI Agents: How to
object: and Scale with Confidence
source_quote: Organizations are racing to develop and deploy AI agents, but without a controlled process for development and deployment, adopting agents at scale risks creating confusion and technical and governance issues that IT and finance teams might be struggling with for years to come.

subject: Governed AI Agents: How to
object: and Scale with Confidence
source_quote: With Boomi Agentstudio , you can increase visibility and transform agents from black-box experiments into governed, enterprise-grade agentic workflows. Four key Agentstudio features help provide the governance that every organization deploying agents needs.

subject: NAIRR
object: Resource Requests to Advance AI Research
source_quote: NAIRR Pilot Resource Requests to Advance AI Research

subject: NAIRR
object: Resource Requests to Advance AI Research
source_quote: In the NAIRR Pilot, the US National Science Foundation (NSF), the US Department of Energy (DOE), and numerous private and non-profit sector partners are providing an opportunity for the research community to request access to a set of computing, model, platform and educational resources for projects related to advancing AI research. This call for proposals will be open from May 6, 2024, until the end of the NAIRR Pilot program or until all resources have been committed to projects. Projects will be awarded for twelve (12) months duration.

subject: NAIRR
object: Resource Requests to Advance AI Research
source_quote: Other projects that align with the broader objectives of the NAIRR Pilot, as well as projects in other areas of AI research and applications, may secondarily be considered for allocation.

subject: NAIRR
object: Resource Requests to Advance AI Research
source_quote: The set of resources available through the NAIRR Pilot has been expanded to include additional resources funded by federal agencies as well as resources contributed by private and non-profit sector partners. Over time, we expect new resources will be added to the NAIRR Pilot, and some resources may be removed from the pilot as their available contributions are committed to projects.

subject: OpenAI
object: AgentKit to help developers build and ship AI agents
source_quote: The launch highlights OpenAI’s push to increase developer adoption by making agent building faster and easier. It also signals a competitive move against other AI platforms racing to offer integrated tools for building autonomous agents for enterprises that can perform complex tasks, not just respond to prompts.

subject: undisclosed_subject
object: 苹果 Xcode 27 核心首次深度集成 AI 智能体：支持自然语言修 Bug、构建 App
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 18 日消息，科技媒体 Appleinsider 今天（6 月 18 日）发布博文，报道称在 2026 年全球开发者大会（WWDC）期间， 苹果公司针对氛围编程（vibe coding）开发场景，深度优化 Xcode 27，核心功能首次深度集成 AI 智能体体验。

subject: Claude
object: Claude Code 用户画像：平均每周使用 20 小时，AI 代码修改占 26%
source_quote: IT之家 6 月 17 日消息，Anthropic 昨日（6 月 16 日）发布博文，分析约 23.5 万用户的约 40 万次 Claude Code 会话， 发现编程智能体使用率翻倍，用户平均每周投入 20 小时。

subject: Claude
object: Claude Code 用户画像：平均每周使用 20 小时，AI 代码修改占 26%
source_quote: Anthropic 通过自动分析工具 Clio，在保护隐私的前提下，分析了 2025 年 10 月至 2026 年 4 月约 23.5 万用户的 40 万次会话。

subject: Claude
object: Claude Code 用户画像：平均每周使用 20 小时，AI 代码修改占 26%
source_quote: 用户画像分析显示，约 70% 的会话可推断出职业，其中“计算机和数学相关职业”占比最大，其次为“商业和金融业务”、“艺术设计与媒体”、“管理”及“生命科学、物理科学和社会科学”。

subject: Claude
object: Claude Code 用户画像：平均每周使用 20 小时，AI 代码修改占 26%
source_quote: Anthropic 还通过三个信号（用户是否要求验证、是否倾向于纠正 Claude Code、以及 Claude Code 是否纠正用户）将用户专业领域知识分为 5 个等级。
